Oil Prices Top $90 as Kuwaiti Tanker Hit in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: A Kuwait-owned oil products tanker was struck by a projectile in the Strait of Hormuz near Oman as tensions escalate around the key shipping lanes of the Middle East, sending Brent back above $90 per barrel. The Kaifan tanker, owned by Kuwait Oil Tanker Co. S.A.K., was the vessel

headlines.title: India Keeps Buying Russian Oil at Near-Record Pace Despite Expired Waiver
headlines.summary: India's crude oil imports have remained close to record-high levels in July despite the end of the U.S. waiver the previous month. The U.S. quietly let the waiver allowing the purchase of Russian oil loaded on tankers expire on June 17, just as the U.S. and Iran signed the memora

headlines.title: Pakistan Shells Out Record Sums for Spot LNG as Qatar Supply Falters
headlines.summary: Pakistan is paying top dollar for LNG supply as the renewed closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the stranding of cargoes from its term supplier Qatar have forced the South Asian country to seek liquefied natural gas on the spot market.
